events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: Standard work execution, rough-complete, photos show completed pieces but area count and remaining scope not listed, submitted package lacks quantity takeoff needed to score checkpoint. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since missing quantity takeoff needed to score checkpoint, cannot verify completeness. Likely decision needs_more_info. Risk? Missing documentation for quality gate could be medium. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions none. percent_complete maybe 70? value 0. confidence? We can set 0.6. findings: missing quantity takeoff, cannot verify area count/remaining scope. actions: submit quantity takeoff and area count before checkpoint scoring. rationale. references: site standard work, TWI. Need ensure JSON valid.
